data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #3' aimed to simulate a failed payment retry logic but was unable to do so due to prior steps failing with HTTP 500 errors. Specifically, multiple validation steps related to the subscription creation encountered the same error, indicating a systemic issue that prevents the validation of the persona scenario. This leads to a gap in coverage as the expected result cannot be confirmed or reported due to these failures.
gaps: System errors prevent validation of payment retry logic.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
